name: Samantha Serna
ai_summary: Samantha Serna is an experienced caregiver who has worked with children from eight months to school age, primarily within her family, and seeks full-time or part-time work around her daughter's school schedule in Lawrenceville, GA (5-10 mile radius). Her conflict resolution approach involves stopping behavior immediately, checking on hurt children, and guiding them to understand feelings, and she believes her patience, reliability, and natural connection with kids make her an excellent teacher.
